title: Single Cell Analysis of a Bacterial Sender-Receiver System.
author: Ramalho T Meyer A Muckl A Kapsner K Gerland U Simmel FC
content: S-EPMC4726700 PMC4726700 Single Cell Analysis of a Bacterial Sender-Receiver System. Monitoring gene expression dynamics on the single cell level provides important information on cellular heterogeneity and stochasticity, and potentially allows for more accurate quantitation of gene expression
